functions.title: Guide Book #14
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #14§r
§lScarecrow§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Cursed, Construct, Object, Magical, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest,

Pale Garden, Taiga, Jungle, Swamp, Cherry Grove, Meadow, Corrupted Forest.
•§lHealth§r: 20
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Wheat, Stick, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Cursed)§r: Any mob wielding

the Curserer Staff.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Cursed)§r: Players, Corrupted Raven, Iron Golem, Raven, Snow Golem, Traders, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Uncursed)§r: Wild Raven, Corrupted Raven, Cursed Rat, Rabbit,

Wild Rat, Wild Squirrel.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Random Hoe
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2
•Can sleep during the day.
•Can be interacted with Shears to remove the Carved Pumpkin.
•Can be interacted with Farmer's Hat to equip it.

•Can be uncursed using a §lCursed Eye§r in your mainhand and §lBook of Curses§r in your offhand.
•Can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Possessed by twisted magic, Scarecrows roam farmlands and forests by night, wielding rusted hoes with eerie purpose. Born from cursed effigies, they attack anything they perceive as a threat to their territory — from players

to wildlife. By day, they often return to a dormant, slumbering state. Though fearsome, they can be uncursed through a powerful ritual, revealing a more protective, if still unsettling, spirit beneath the straw.§’
